insight:
Yesterday was a solid recovery day with your body showing excellent signs of readiness just 5 days out from Chester! Your 5,650 steps suggest you kept things nice and easy, while your stress level of just 22/100 and 7.2 hours of sleep indicate your body is properly winding down into race week mode.

Your HRV of 108ms sits beautifully in your optimal range, and that resting heart rate of 47 bpm shows your cardiovascular system is firing on all cylinders. These numbers are exactly what we want to see this close to race day - your body is recovered and primed for performance. Stick to your planned session today without any modifications.

With your calorie burn at 2,389 yesterday, you're right on track with your 2,300 target. Focus on getting that 175g protein today to support final tissue repair before race week - your body is using these last few days to put the finishing touches on your fitness adaptations.
